message.content:
@startuml
participant CPO1
participant HUB
participant MSP1

CPO1 -> HUB : HTTP: GET\n  TO: MSP1\n  FROM: CPO1

activate HUB

HUB -> MSP1 : HTTP: GET\n  TO: MSP1\n  FROM: CPO1

MSP1 --> HUB : HTTP: RESPONSE\n  TO: CPO1\n  FROM: MSP1

HUB --> CPO1 : HTTP: RESPONSE\n  TO: CPO1\n  FROM: MSP1

deactivate HUB
@enduml
